items.title: Hello Bluesky!
items.author: Morten Stig Jensen
items.body_excerpt:
Hello Bluesky!

I'm looking for a(nother) place to write this season.

If you're looking for NBA analysis, and someone who will crack bad jokes at editorial meetings, I'm absolutely your guy.

I'm Danish, but I'm in recovery. So my English proficiency should be at a decent level.

Here's my work:

media.title: Morten Stig Jensen - Yahoo Sports
media.description: Morten has covered the NBA since 2008 in national and international media. He takes particular interest in team construction analysis and is privately very, very Danish.

“I think he’d really, really help us and add to our group. But he’s making a big decision here."

www.inquirer.com/sixers/sixer...

media.title: Mike Gansey ‘never would have envisioned’ landing Jaylen Brown in his first Sixers offseason — and is happy to wait on LeBron James’ decision
media.description: “We’d love to have him in Philly,” Gansey told The Inquirer from the Sixers’ team hotel Tuesday morning. “I think he’d really, really help us and add to our group. But he’s making a big decision."

items.title: Are Summer League players allowed to return to college basketball if they don’t make an NBA roster? Of course not.
items.author: Matt Norlander
items.body_excerpt:
Are Summer League players allowed to return to college basketball if they don’t make an NBA roster? Of course not. 

Is that going to stop them from trying? Of course not. 

Story from Vegas on a reality that the NBA and college basketball are bracing for later this summer.

media.title: From NBA Summer League back to college basketball? NCAA coaches bracing for more roster chaos
media.description: As the NCAA's new age-based eligibility rule comes under legal attacks, some agents see a pathway from the NBA back to college
